UCY.reason: domain lacks strict train/val/test coverage in current all-agent split

proximity_guard_selection.note: Fast evidence run: validation proximity search is disabled to avoid repeated group-distance scans; test still performs full same-frame proximity/smoothness audit.

ETH_UCY.caveat: Learned domain-local full-waypoint neural dynamics are trained from past-only all-agent tokens and future waypoint labels. Evaluation remains dataset-local raw-frame 2.5D; no Stage5C/SMC/metric/seconds claim.
